touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Emily Perez, Director of CS at LunarDigital, expressing interest in improving pipeline visibility for their CS team. Initial inquiry about capabilities.
next_steps: Send follow-up with discovery questions and calendar link

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Emily with discovery questions about current pipeline challenges and team structure. Proposed time for qualification call.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the search for a pipeline visibility solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: Team has grown to 57 people and current tools aren't scaling

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Initial qualification call with Emily. Discussed team size (57 seats), current pain points with visibility into CS activities, and preliminary fit for automations plus consulting package.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution handle integration with existing CRM systems?
questions_asked.answer: Native integrations with major CRMs, API available for custom connections

questions_asked.question: What tools are you currently evaluating?
questions_asked.answer: Looking at Fathom and one other vendor

next_steps: Schedule follow-up to discuss technical requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with recap of qualification call and requested org chart. Shared case study relevant to PropTech vertical.
Qualification call focused on team structure and use cases. Emily mentioned she's been in the Director role for 4 months and is looking to make an early impact with better tooling.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Will need to loop in IT and get Sarah (CEO) involved for final approval

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: 6-8 weeks for full rollout with consulting package

next_steps: Emily to identify technical evaluators from IT
Schedule next call to discuss implementation

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call diving into specific pipeline visibility gaps. Discussed reporting needs and how AI-processed call summaries would help with forecasting accuracy.

questions_asked.question: How accurate is the AI summarization for technical calls?
questions_asked.answer: 90%+ accuracy with ability to customize for industry terminology

next_steps: Send sample AI summaries from PropTech customers

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email transitioning to discovery phase. Shared PropTech customer samples and proposed agenda for discovery call with broader team.
Final qualification call before discovery. Discussed budget considerations and Emily confirmed $75-80K range is feasible for 57 seats with consulting.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Hoping to have something in place within 2 months

questions_asked.question: Can we do a phased rollout or does it need to be all 57 seats at once?
questions_asked.answer: Can phase, but pricing is optimized for full team deployment

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Emily covering current state workflow, pain points with manual call logging, and competitive evaluation process. Emily mentioned Fathom is in the mix but concerns about their enterprise features.

questions_asked.question: How do you handle data security and compliance for recorded calls?
questions_asked.answer: SOC2 Type II certified, regional data storage options available

questions_asked.question: What's the decision-making process at LunarDigital for a tool like this?
questions_asked.answer: Need IT technical validation, then exec approval from Sarah

objections: Need to make sure integration doesn't disrupt current workflows
next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with IT team

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call focused on desired future state. Discussed automation capabilities, reporting dashboards, and how consulting services would support change management across 57-person team.

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include specifically?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, custom workflow setup, training sessions, quarterly business reviews

next_steps: Coordinate technical eval with Leila Rogers and David Bauer from IT

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email recapping discovery insights and proposing technical evaluation session. Requested IT team availability for hands-on demo.
Follow-up email sharing additional discovery materials including ROI calculator and implementation timeline doc.
next_steps: Wait for technical eval scheduling confirmation

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation scheduled with Leila Rogers was rescheduled due to conflicting IT priority. Proposed new time later in the week.
next_steps: Confirm new time works for all IT stakeholders
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on reschedule and offering flexible timing options for technical team.
Follow-up email to Emily confirming rescheduled technical eval and sharing pre-read materials for IT team.
next_steps: Technical eval with Leila Rogers scheduled for tomorrow

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation call with Leila Rogers (IT Director). Deep dive into API capabilities, security architecture, data handling, and integration requirements. Leila is thorough but engagement is positive.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and can we customize it?
questions_asked.answer: Standard 7-year retention, customizable by data type with enterprise plan

questions_asked.question: How does the HNSW-based retrieval work and what's the latency?
questions_asked.answer: Sub-100ms query times, vector embeddings updated real-time, cosine similarity for semantic search

questions_asked.question: Any concerns about the technical architecture?
questions_asked.answer: Looks solid, want to see live demo with our data schema

next_steps: Schedule follow-up technical session with sample data
Leila to review with David Bauer

touches.ai_summary: Second technical evaluation with Leila Rogers and Ivy Baker (Account Manager). Hands-on demo with LunarDigital's sample data schema. Discussed XGBoost scoring model for deal prioritization and custom field mapping.

questions_asked.question: Can we white-label the interface for our CS team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, custom branding available with enterprise tier

questions_asked.question: What's the API rate limit?
questions_asked.answer: 10K requests/hour standard, can increase for enterprise needs

questions_asked.question: Does this meet your technical requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, ready to recommend moving forward to proposal stage

next_steps: Schedule exec meeting with Sarah Davis

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Emily with technical eval summary and confirmed IT approval. Proposed exec meeting with Sarah Davis to discuss strategic value and business case.
next_steps: Prepare exec-level deck focused on ROI

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Sarah Davis (CEO) and Emily Perez. Discussed strategic value of pipeline visibility, ROI projections showing 20% efficiency gain for CS team, and alignment with LunarDigital's growth plans.

questions_asked.question: What's the cost structure and are there volume discounts?
questions_asked.answer: Per-seat pricing with consulting package, enterprise discounts available

next_steps: Emily and Sarah to review internally

touches.ai_summary: Second exec meeting scheduled with Sarah Davis was rescheduled due to board meeting conflict. Proposed alternative time next week.
Proposal call with Emily to walk through formal proposal: $75,100 ACV for 57 seats with automations_plus_consulting package. Discussed payment terms and implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the annual vs quarterly payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: Can offer quarterly with standard terms, annual prepay gets 5% discount

next_steps: Emily to share with procurement (Hazel Watson, Rowan Perez)

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with formal proposal document, security questionnaire responses, and customer references in PropTech vertical.
Follow-up email checking in on proposal review and offering to address any questions from procurement team.
next_steps: Wait for feedback from Hazel and Rowan

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Emily noting Fathom proposal is also under review and offering to provide competitive comparison if helpful.

questions_asked.question: Any feedback from the procurement review so far?
questions_asked.answer: Team is comparing Fathom pricing, will have questions soon

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sharing comparison doc highlighting enterprise features and consulting value vs Fathom's self-service model.
Negotiation call with Emily. Fathom came in $12K lower for base product but without consulting. Discussion around consulting ROI and whether discount is possible to match competitive pricing.

questions_asked.question: Can you match Fathom's pricing or offer a discount on the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: Can explore options - what's most important: lower price or full consulting support?

questions_asked.question: If we removed consulting, would that put us in competitive range?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, but Emily strongly prefers keeping consulting given team's size and her newness to role

objections: Fathom pricing is creating internal pressure to reduce costs
next_steps: Schedule follow-up to discuss revised terms

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call scheduled to discuss discount options was rescheduled by Emily due to internal budget review meeting conflict.

Negotiation call to discuss revised proposal. Offered 8% discount ($69,100 ACV) to stay competitive while maintaining consulting package value. Emily receptive but needs to confirm with Sarah and procurement.

questions_asked.question: Is this your best and final offer?
questions_asked.answer: This represents significant investment in partnership - limited room beyond this

next_steps: Emily to present revised pricing to Sarah and procurement

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Emily following internal review. Procurement pushing for 12% discount to match Fathom total cost. Discussed value gap and agreed to meet at 10% ($67,600) with commitment to annual payment.

questions_asked.question: If we commit to annual prepay, can you get to 10% off?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, 10% with annual prepay works - need commitment by end of week

questions_asked.question: Does this pricing get us to a close?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, Emily believes this will get Sarah's approval and close out Fathom

next_steps: Emily to get final sign-off from Sarah

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call to finalize terms at $67,600 ACV (10% discount) for 57 seats with automations_plus_consulting, annual prepay. Emily confirmed Sarah approved, procurement (Hazel, Rowan) ready to process paperwork. Implementation to start in 2 weeks.

questions_asked.question: Any remaining concerns or blockers to moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: No, team is aligned and excited to get started
